latency_or_cost_intuition: Milliseconds to seconds; low direct cost; high model-risk exposure
what_it_teaches: Cheap samples are useful for pruning and sensitivity checks not final evidence
record_for_reuse: Model assumptions workload slice constraints and proxy-validity notes

latency_or_cost_intuition: Seconds to hours depending on workload capture and replay setup
what_it_teaches: Workload provenance is part of the sample not background metadata
record_for_reuse: Trace version sampling policy software stack and privacy/filtering choices

latency_or_cost_intuition: Minutes to days depending on model detail and target workload
what_it_teaches: Simulator evidence is scoped by abstraction calibration and unsupported states
record_for_reuse: Simulator version configuration seeds workload revision and calibration notes

latency_or_cost_intuition: Hours to days when synthesis timing power or physical feedback enters the loop
what_it_teaches: High-fidelity samples are scarce and multiobjective
record_for_reuse: Tool versions constraints process assumptions waived warnings and rejected candidates

latency_or_cost_intuition: High setup and shared-resource cost; high throughput once mapped
what_it_teaches: Speed changes observability and debugging semantics not just wall-clock time
record_for_reuse: Mapping constraints observability limits debug hooks and queue/resource state

latency_or_cost_intuition: Weeks to years and high commitment
what_it_teaches: Authoritative measurements still require context and human decision authority
record_for_reuse: Population deployment version rollback policy incident context and decision owner
